summary.about: How African trade liberalization under AfCFTA could change economic activity and pollution.
summary.audience: African trade, climate and development policymakers.
summary.method: Extends GTAP 10a with emissions accounting for CO2 and other greenhouse gases and pollutants.
summary.insights: Most members gain trade, GDP and jobs, but transport and production raise emissions—especially non-CO2 gases—in many countries.
